candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component only, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line exists.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash line matching cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement opening balance, not the balance sheet stock variable.

candidates.row_label: Foreign currency effects on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet cash balance, not cash flow statement lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt component only, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line exists.

candidates.why: Clean total for current interest-bearing debt; best match for short-term debt and avoids summing components. Lease current portion appears separately, so this line likely captures total current debt including lease in some years, but it is the primary reported current debt total.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Explicitly excludes leases and matches current maturities of long-term debt, but may omit other short-term borrowings if any exist.
Debt maturity disclosure can proxy for current portion of long-term debt, but it is a maturity schedule disclosure rather than main balance sheet debt line and may be broader/less direct.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose an exact non-lease current debt line outside the STD shortlist. This best fits the baseline rule to exclude lease liabilities. Did not also select 'Interest-bearing current liabilities' to avoid possible double counting with lease current portion.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Exact total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred over components or cash flow lines.

candidates.row_label: Plant, Machinery & Equipment - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: PPE subcomponent and balancing line, not total PPE.
Only a component of PPE and gross rather than total net.
Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Other Non-Current Assets - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Non-current asset subtotal/balancing line, not total assets.

variables.notes: Clear reported total assets line exists.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.
Intermediate subtotal before other operating cash items; less preferred than net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported cash flow measure.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the net operating cash flow line rather than an operating subtotal.
